summary: Iteration 95: Post-Cleanup Regression Testing - ALL 28 TESTS PASSED (100%). Verified system stability after major cleanup: 36 dead route files deleted, competitor names scrubbed, broken imports fixed. All 10 engines active, all major module endpoints working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 95 verified system stability after major cleanup. All endpoints tested and working. Key findings: (1) Health endpoint shows all 10 engines active. (2) Enterprise BI STR/Portfolio dashboards working. (3) Concierge outlets/equipment/guest-report working. (4) Purchasing dashboard/vendors working. (5) Item Mapping catalog (30 items), fuzzy match (85% confidence), stats all working. (6) Daily Reports GM Flash working. (7) 21-Day Forecast at /api/forecast-21/forecast working. (8) EchoAi3 identity/health working (identity was refactored inline). (9) Procurement vendor-scorecards/ap-aging working. (10) No competitor names (Craftable, OnTrack, BirchStreet, Fourth, Builder.io) found in responses. (11) Operations/Forecasting/POS stats endpoints working. (12) RBAC users, Calendar events, Enterprise command center all working.
